issue: can_withdraw(balance, amount) wrongly rejects a withdrawal of the entire balance. Withdrawing exactly the full balance (amount == balance) should be allowed, since it simply leaves a balance of zero, but the function returns False for it -- for example can_withdraw(100, 100) returns False instead of True, and can_withdraw(0, 0) returns False instead of True. Withdrawals strictly below the balance work, and over-balance withdrawals are correctly rejected; only the equal-to-balance boundary is handled wrong.
